intro.p: A hiker leaves their campsite and hikes in two stages.

content.p: First, the hiker leaves the campsite on a bearing of {{b1_card}} (also written as {{b1_num}}), hiking at {{speed1}} units per hour for {{time1}} hours.
The hiker then turns and continues on a bearing of {{b2_card}} (also written as {{b2_num}}), hiking at {{speed2}} units per hour for {{time2}} hours.
Determine the distance and bearing the hiker must travel to return directly to the original campsite. Give the bearing in both forms shown above.

outtro.p: The hiker must travel {{dist_back}} units to return to the campsite.
The required bearing is {{bearing_cardinal}}, which may also be written as {{bearing_num}}^\circ.
